title: Plan import: bring existing todos and checklists into work/

acceptance_criteria.text: `repopact import-plan` imports plan items from todo-style directories (incl. completed/deferred/blocked lifecycle folders) and from markdown checklist files into work/, runnable standalone on an already-adopted repo.
Import is honest (completed items become waived, no fabricated evidence), non-destructive (source preserved, origin recorded), and idempotent (re-run is a no-op); regression-tested.
Proven on real data: forgewire's ~75-item todos/ tree imports into a populated work/ that validates as conformant.
